parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: 19-digit transaction ID of the completed payment to refund.

request.description: JSON body. The Refund request field (refundAmount, for partial refund) is on the JS-rendered Refund sub-page and not in this source.

responses.description: HTTP 200 with the standard response envelope {returnCode, returnMessage, info}. returnCode 0000 = success; info present only on success.

missing: Refund request body field (refundAmount) not in this source (JS-rendered sub-page).
